problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
